category_sources: Official docs at https://docs.ffmate.io/ describe FFmate as FFmpeg automation for the modern stack.
source_facts.description says it is an FFmpeg automation layer.
display_name_sources: Official documentation at https://docs.ffmate.io/ uses the display name FFmate.
Official repository README at https://github.com/welovemedia/ffmate uses the heading FFmate.
docs_sources: Official README at https://github.com/welovemedia/ffmate says product documentation is available at https://docs.ffmate.io.
source_facts.homepage is the official documentation domain https://docs.ffmate.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/welovemedia/ffmate; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official README at https://github.com/welovemedia/ffmate lists REST API, webhooks, watchfolders, presets, and transcoding workflows.
